Top 5 AI Tools for Developers in 2026

The landscape of AI-powered development tools has evolved rapidly.

1. Claude Code

An AI coding assistant that integrates directly into your terminal.

2. GitHub Copilot

AI pair programmer that suggests code completions in your editor.

3. Cursor

AI-first code editor built on VS Code foundations.

4. Bolt

Full-stack app builder powered by AI.

5. Devin

Autonomous AI software engineer for complex tasks.
